title: GWAS Results
description: View genome-wide association results for a FinnGen endpoint. Explore the Manhattan plot, QQ plot, top variant table, and locus zoom views for significant genomic regions.
tips: Variants with p-value < 5×10⁻⁸ are considered genome-wide significant and highlighted in the top hits table.
The locus zoom view shows fine-mapping details for a selected genomic region including linkage disequilibrium structure.
Effect sizes are reported as odds ratios for binary endpoints and beta coefficients for quantitative traits.
Use the Export button to download the full or filtered summary statistics as a tab-delimited file.
Cross-reference GWAS hits with the OMOP vocabulary to identify known drug targets and clinical concepts for each variant.
